summary: Full-stack testing of Daribnb marketing site. Backend: 14/14 pytest passed (root welcome, simulate across multiple cities/types, validation for bedrooms 0-20, contact creation, email validation, contacts list excludes _id). Frontend: landing loads, French hero 'Votre bien Airbnb' visible, simulator end-to-end (Marrakech+Appartement+2br -> three MAD cards displayed), FAQ accordion expands (aria-expanded false->true), WhatsApp links all use wa.me/212646218407 (3 occurrences: float button, contact card, hero CTA), navigation items present (6), contact form submission returns 200 and displays 'Message reçu' success state.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py /api/contact returns 200 instead of 201 for resource creation — minor REST convention issue, non-blocking.
CORS_ORIGINS defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True — browsers will reject credentialed requests; acceptable here since no auth, but flag for future.
No server-side sanitization/length limits on contact message/name (XSS/DB bloat risk if admin panel ever renders raw).
seed_data_creation: Created a few TEST_-prefixed contacts via /api/contact during tests; not cleaned up (no DELETE endpoint).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_daribnb.py and covers all 4 endpoints. Frontend all data-testids confirmed: simulator-city-select, simulator-type-select, simulator-capacity-input, simulator-submit-btn, simulator-result, contact-name-input, contact-phone-input, contact-email-input, contact-submit-btn, contact-success, landing-page. Shadcn Select options are selectable via role='option' with exact name. FAQ uses standard accordion with aria-expanded buttons.
